action_text: Click the chart options (three-dots) button on the report
rationale: Seeing the raw data table from the chart options may provide exact counts per agent, letting us quickly identify the minimum without guessing by bar size.

action_text: Hover over a small bar near the right end of the chart to read its tooltip
rationale: We need the agent(s) with the fewest incidents; hovering one of the smallest right-end bars should reveal a tooltip with the agent name and exact count.

action_text: Hover over the adjacent small bar near the right end to read its tooltip
rationale: If the previous bar was “Other” or not the minimum, hovering the next small bar should reveal another candidate agent and count to compare.

action_text: Hover over another small bar on the right side of the chart to read its tooltip
rationale: Continue identifying the minimum count by checking another of the smallest bars; this helps find all agents tied at the minimum.

action_text: Hover over a further small bar near the right side to read its tooltip
rationale: One more hover on a nearby small bar increases the chance of capturing all agents with the least incident count.
